distinctive_elements: First Toaplan title to utilize FM synthesis
War-themed atmosphere inspired by Apocalypse Now
Thailand-influenced scenic mood in audio design

notes: Original arcade release (Flying Shark) from 1987. Genesis port from 1990 has insufficient documented audio parameters in source material. Wikipedia article provides composer names and FM synthesis context but lacks specific tempo, key, chord progression, or SFX characteristic data. No per-area breakdown of music parameters available in provided source.
